_description: Put locked character into a scene with expression. Stage 2. No product. Tests character lock + expression control.
_usage: Attach locked character image as reference. Fill variables. Generate. Verify character held before moving to product integration.

subject.LOCKED_FROM_REFERENCE: [FILL: list ALL signature details that MUST appear]
subject.hair: [FILL: 'Same as reference' + any minor allowed changes like strand movement]
subject.apparel: [FILL: same as reference OR new outfit if script requires]

mood.emotion: [FILL: describe at 30% intensity. Understate. Specify the SECOND of the emotion (0.3 = subtle, 2.0 = performative)]
mood.facial_expression: [FILL: specific muscle movements. Which eyebrow, mm of mouth opening, which side moves. Include character's asymmetry pattern]

pose.body_position: [FILL: natural, not posed. Per script context]
pose.head_and_gaze: Looking slightly off-camera (2-3 degrees right of lens, at phone screen). Chin slightly down. Head tilt: [FILL: degrees and direction]
pose.framing: Off-center. Imperfect. Horizon tilted 2 degrees. Phone below frame, NOT visible. Chest-up selfie distance

phone_hand.action: Below frame. Phone NOT visible. Only finger edge at bottom of image

free_hand.action: [FILL: gesture matching emotion. Chest-touch = surprise, chin-rest = skepticism, hair-touch = casual, frozen-reach = interrupted]

environment.setting: [FILL: per script. ALL IN SHARP FOCUS]
environment.background_elements: [FILL: specific lived-in details. Real objects, real mess]
environment.NO_PRODUCTS: Zero products in frame. This is a scene/expression test only

camera.DOF: DEEP. Face AND background sharp. NO blur. NO portrait mode
camera.processing: Apple over-sharpened skin, warm-neutral color science
camera.distortion: 23mm wide-angle selfie distortion: nose 5-10% larger, face slightly wider

lighting.source: [FILL: per environment. Window + overhead typical for kitchen]
lighting.shadows: [FILL: shadow direction on face, under-chin shadow from selfie angle]

negative_prompt: [FILL: add character-specific negatives like 'missing eyebrow scar']
